title: Architect Studio Portfolio
seoTitle: Architect Studio Portfolio - Downloadable Premium Portfolio Template | Multiverse
metaDescription: A structured architecture portfolio with refined grids, calm typography, and project-led spatial storytelling.
summary: A structured architecture portfolio with refined grids, calm typography, and project-led spatial storytelling.
description: This template is suited for architects and spatial designers who need a clean portfolio with stronger project framing, restrained color use, and a credible studio-like presence.
audience: architects, interior designers, and spatial studios
prompt: Design a premium architecture portfolio with strict grids, calm typography, project-led case studies, and an understated studio aesthetic.
layoutNotes: The layout should feel spatial, ordered, and project-first.
This template fits creators who need a credible studio presence instead of a playful personal page.
responsiveNotes: Project grids become stacked cards without losing the ordered hierarchy.
Whitespace remains generous so the portfolio stays premium on mobile screens.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Architect — Portfolio</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,700;1,400&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --black: #0a0a0a;
  --white: #f5f4f1;
  --warm-gray-100: #e8e6e3;
  --warm-gray-200: #d1cdc8;
  --warm-gray-300: #b5b0a8;
  --warm-gray-400: #8a8580;
  --warm-gray-500: #6b6560;
  --warm-gray-600: #4a4540;
  --warm-gray-700: #2d2a27;
  --blueprint: rgba(160,175,190,0.12);
  --blueprint-line: rgba(160,175,190,0.25);
  --blueprint-accent: #7a9bb5;
  --accent: #c4a882;
  --accent-dark: #a08860;
  --font-sans: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
  --font-serif: 'Playfair Display', serif;
  --transition: 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94);
  --transition-slow: 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94);
}

*, *::before, *::after { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

html { scroll-behavior: smooth; font-size: 16px; }

body {
  font-family: var(--font-sans);
  background: var(--white);
  color: var(--warm-gray-700);
  line-height: 1.7;
  overflow-x: hidden;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}

/* ─── Utility ─── */
.container { max-width: 1320px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 clamp(1.5rem, 4vw, 4rem); }
.section-pad { padding: clamp(5rem, 10vw, 9rem) 0; }
.section-label {
  font-family: var(--font-sans);
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.25em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.section-label::before {
  content: '';
  width: 2rem;
  height: 1px;
  background: var(--accent);
}
.section-title {
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.2rem);
  font-weight: 400;
  color: var(--black);
  line-height: 1.2;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.reveal {
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(40px);
  transition: opacity 0.8s ease, transform 0.8s ease;
}
.reveal.visible {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0);
}

/* ─── Blueprint grid background ─── */
.blueprint-bg {
  background-image:
    linear-gradient(var(--blueprint-line) 1px, transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(90deg, var(--blueprint-line) 1px, transparent 1px);
  background-size: 60px 60px;
}

/* ─── Navigation ─── */
.nav {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  z-index: 1000;
  padding: 1.5rem 0;
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.nav.scrolled {
  background: rgba(245,244,241,0.95);
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  padding: 1rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--warm-gray-200);
}
.nav-inner {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
}
.nav-logo {
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-size: 1.3rem;
  color: var(--black);
  text-decoration: none;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
}
.nav-logo span { color: var(--accent); }
.nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2.5rem; list-style: none; }
.nav-links a {
  text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--warm-gray-600);
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  transition: var(--transition);
  position: relative;
}
.nav-links a::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: -4px;
  left: 0;
  width: 0;
  height: 1px;
  background: var(--accent);
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.nav-links a:hover { color: var(--black); }
.nav-links a:hover::after { width: 100%; }
.nav-toggle {
  display: none;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 5px;
  background: none;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: 4px;
}
.nav-toggle span {
  width: 24px;
  height: 1.5px;
  background: var(--black);
  transition: var(--transition);
}

/* ─── Hero ─── */
.hero {
  min-height: 100vh;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: var(--white);
}
.hero-blueprint {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  opacity: 0.5;
}
.hero-blueprint svg {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
}
.hero-content {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 4rem;
  align-items: center;
  width: 100%;
}
.hero-text { max-width: 600px; }
.hero-overline {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.3em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 1rem;
}
.hero-overline::before {
  content: '';
  width: 3rem;
  height: 1px;
  background: var(--accent);
}
.hero-heading {
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 6vw, 5rem);
  font-weight: 400;
  color: var(--black);
  line-height: 1.1;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.hero-heading em {
  font-style: italic;
  color: var(--accent-dark);
}
.hero-desc {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-500);
  max-width: 440px;
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
  line-height: 1.8;
}
.hero-cta {
  display: flex;
  gap: 1.5rem;
  align-items: center;
}
.btn {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  padding: 0.9rem 2rem;
  font-family: var(--font-sans);
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  text-decoration: none;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.btn-primary {
  background: var(--black);
  color: var(--white);
}
.btn-primary:hover { background: var(--warm-gray-700); }
.btn-outline {
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--warm-gray-600);
  border: 1px solid var(--warm-gray-300);
}
.btn-outline:hover {
  border-color: var(--black);
  color: var(--black);
}
.btn svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; }
.hero-visual {
  position: relative;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
}
.hero-svg-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 520px;
}
.hero-svg-wrap svg { width: 100%; height: auto; }
.draw-line {
  stroke-dasharray: 2000;
  stroke-dashoffset: 2000;
  animation: drawIn 3s ease forwards;
}
.draw-line-delay1 { animation-delay: 0.3s; }
.draw-line-delay2 { animation-delay: 0.6s; }
.draw-line-delay3 { animation-delay: 0.9s; }
.draw-line-delay4 { animation-delay: 1.2s; }
@keyframes drawIn {
  to { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
}

/* ─── Split Projects ─── */
.split-projects { background: var(--warm-gray-100); }
.split-project {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  min-height: 80vh;
  position: relative;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--warm-gray-200);
}
.split-project:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.split-project-image {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: var(--warm-gray-200);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}
.split-project-image .placeholder-img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  transition: transform 0.8s ease;
}
.split-project:hover .placeholder-img { transform: scale(1.03); }
.split-project-image .img-overlay {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(10,10,10,0.1), transparent);
}
.split-project-image .corner-mark {
  position: absolute;
  width: 40px;
  height: 40px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(196,168,130,0.4);
}
.corner-mark.tl { top: 1.5rem; left: 1.5rem; border-right: none; border-bottom: none; }
.corner-mark.tr { top: 1.5rem; right: 1.5rem; border-left: none; border-bottom: none; }
.corner-mark.bl { bottom: 1.5rem; left: 1.5rem; border-right: none; border-top: none; }
.corner-mark.br { bottom: 1.5rem; right: 1.5rem; border-left: none; border-top: none; }
.split-project-info {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 5rem);
}
.split-project-number {
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-size: 5rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-200);
  line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.split-project-title {
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 3vw, 2.5rem);
  font-weight: 400;
  color: var(--black);
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.split-project-meta {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  display: flex;
  gap: 2rem;
}
.split-project-desc {
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-500);
  line-height: 1.8;
  max-width: 420px;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}
.split-project-link {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--black);
  text-decoration: none;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.split-project-link:hover { gap: 1.25rem; color: var(--accent-dark); }
.split-project-link svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; transition: var(--transition); }
.split-project:nth-child(even) .split-project-image { order: 2; }
.split-project:nth-child(even) .split-project-info { order: 1; }

/* ─── Process / Methodology ─── */
.process { background: var(--white); }
.process-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 0;
  margin-top: 4rem;
  position: relative;
}
.process-step {
  padding: 2.5rem 2rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--warm-gray-200);
  border-right: none;
  position: relative;
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.process-step:last-child { border-right: 1px solid var(--warm-gray-200); }
.process-step:hover { background: var(--warm-gray-100); }
.process-step-number {
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-size: 3rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-200);
  line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.process-step-icon {
  width: 48px;
  height: 48px;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.process-step-icon svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; }
.process-step-title {
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-size: 1.25rem;
  color: var(--black);
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.process-step-desc {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-500);
  line-height: 1.7;
}
.process-connector {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  right: -12px;
  width: 24px;
  height: 24px;
  z-index: 2;
}

/* ─── Awards ─── */
.awards { background: var(--black); color: var(--white); }
.awards .section-label { color: var(--accent); }
.awards .section-label::before { background: var(--accent); }
.awards .section-title { color: var(--white); }
.awards-list {
  margin-top: 3rem;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.award-item {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr 1fr 60px;
  gap: 2rem;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 1.75rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.award-item:first-child { border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); }
.award-item:hover { padding-left: 1rem; }
.award-year {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
}
.award-name {
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 400;
}
.award-org {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-400);
}
.award-arrow {
  width: 20px;
  height: 20px;
  opacity: 0;
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.award-item:hover .award-arrow { opacity: 1; }

/* ─── Gallery ─── */
.gallery { background: var(--warm-gray-100); }
.gallery-filters {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.gallery-filter {
  padding: 0.6rem 1.5rem;
  background: transparent;
  border: 1px solid var(--warm-gray-300);
  font-family: var(--font-sans);
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--warm-gray-500);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.gallery-filter:hover,
.gallery-filter.active {
  background: var(--black);
  color: var(--white);
  border-color: var(--black);
}
.gallery-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 1.5rem;
}
.gallery-item {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  aspect-ratio: 4/3;
  background: var(--warm-gray-200);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.gallery-item:nth-child(1) { grid-column: span 2; aspect-ratio: 16/9; }
.gallery-item:nth-child(5) { grid-column: span 2; aspect-ratio: 16/9; }
.gallery-item-img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  transition: transform 0.8s ease;
}
.gallery-item:hover .gallery-item-img { transform: scale(1.05); }
.gallery-item-overlay {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(10,10,10,0.7), transparent 60%);
  opacity: 0;
  transition: var(--transition);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  padding: 1.5rem;
}
.gallery-item:hover .gallery-item-overlay { opacity: 1; }
.gallery-item-overlay h3 {
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  color: var(--white);
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
}
.gallery-item-overlay p {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
}

/* ─── Clients Marquee ─── */
.clients {
  padding: 4rem 0;
  background: var(--white);
  overflow: hidden;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--warm-gray-200);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--warm-gray-200);
}
.clients-label {
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.25em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--warm-gray-400);
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
}
.marquee-track {
  display: flex;
  animation: marquee 30s linear infinite;
  width: max-content;
}
.marquee-track:hover { animation-play-state: paused; }
.client-logo {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  padding: 0 3rem;
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-size: 1.3rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-300);
  white-space: nowrap;
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.client-logo:hover { color: var(--black); }
@keyframes marquee {
  0% { transform: translateX(0); }
  100% { transform: translateX(-50%); }
}

/* ─── Testimonials ─── */
.testimonials { background: var(--white); }
.testimonial-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 2rem;
  margin-top: 3rem;
}
.testimonial-card {
  padding: 2.5rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--warm-gray-200);
  transition: var(--transition);
  position: relative;
}
.testimonial-card:hover {
  border-color: var(--accent);
  transform: translateY(-4px);
}
.testimonial-quote-mark {
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-size: 4rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-200);
  line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}
.testimonial-text {
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-600);
  line-height: 1.8;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
  font-style: italic;
}
.testimonial-author {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 1rem;
}
.testimonial-avatar {
  width: 44px;
  height: 44px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--warm-gray-200);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-500);
}
.testimonial-name {
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--black);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}
.testimonial-role {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-400);
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}

/* ─── Contact ─── */
.contact { background: var(--warm-gray-100); }
.contact-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 4rem;
  margin-top: 3rem;
}
.contact-info { padding-right: 2rem; }
.contact-info p {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-500);
  line-height: 1.8;
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
}
.contact-detail {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 1.5rem;
}
.contact-detail-item {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.25rem;
}
.contact-detail-label {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
}
.contact-detail-value {
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: var(--black);
}
.contact-form { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; }
.form-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1.5rem; }
.form-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.form-group label {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--warm-gray-500);
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}
.form-group input,
.form-group textarea,
.form-group select {
  padding: 0.9rem 1rem;
  background: var(--white);
  border: 1px solid var(--warm-gray-200);
  font-family: var(--font-sans);
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  color: var(--black);
  transition: var(--transition);
  outline: none;
}
.form-group input:focus,
.form-group textarea:focus,
.form-group select:focus {
  border-color: var(--black);
}
.form-group textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 140px; }
.form-submit {
  align-self: flex-start;
  padding: 1rem 2.5rem;
  background: var(--black);
  color: var(--white);
  border: none;
  font-family: var(--font-sans);
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.form-submit:hover { background: var(--warm-gray-700); }

/* ─── Footer ─── */
.footer {
  background: var(--black);
  color: var(--white);
  padding: 4rem 0 2rem;
}
.footer-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 3rem;
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
}
.footer-brand {
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-size: 1.3rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.footer-brand span { color: var(--accent); }
.footer-desc {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-400);
  line-height: 1.7;
  max-width: 300px;
}
.footer-col-title {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.2em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.footer-links { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.75rem; }
.footer-links a {
  text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--warm-gray-400);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.footer-links a:hover { color: var(--white); }
.footer-bottom {
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  padding-top: 2rem;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-500);
}
.footer-socials { display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; }
.footer-socials a {
  color: var(--warm-gray-400);
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.footer-socials a:hover { color: var(--accent); }

/* ─── Geometric decorations ─── */
.geo-diamond {
  position: absolute;
  width: 80px;
  height: 80px;

<footer class="footer">

<script>
(function () {
  /* ─── Scroll reveal ─── */
  const reveals = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach((entry) => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        entry.target.classList.add('visible');
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.12, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });
  reveals.forEach((el) => observer.observe(el));

  /* ─── Nav scroll effect ─── */
  const nav = document.getElementById('nav');
  let lastScroll = 0;
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    const y = window.scrollY;
    if (y > 80) {
      nav.classList.add('scrolled');
    } else {
      nav.classList.remove('scrolled');
    }
    lastScroll = y;
  }, { passive: true });

  /* ─── Mobile nav toggle ─── */
  const toggle = document.getElementById('navToggle');
  const links = document.getElementById('navLinks');
  toggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
    links.classList.toggle('open');
    const spans = toggle.querySelectorAll('span');
    if (links.classList.contains('open')) {
      spans[0].style.transform = 'rotate(45deg) translate(4px, 4px)';
      spans[1].style.opacity = '0';
      spans[2].style.transform = 'rotate(-45deg) translate(4px, -4px)';
    } else {
      spans[0].style.transform = '';
      spans[1].style.opacity = '';
      spans[2].style.transform = '';
    }
  });

  /* Close nav on link click (mobile) */
  links.querySelectorAll('a').forEach((a) => {
    a.addEventListener('click', () => {
      links.classList.remove('open');
      const spans = toggle.querySelectorAll('span');
      spans[0].style.transform = '';
      spans[1].style.opacity = '';
      spans[2].style.transform = '';
    });
  });

  /* ─── Gallery filter ─── */
  const filters = document.querySelectorAll('.gallery-filter');
  const items = document.querySelectorAll('.gallery-item');
  filters.forEach((btn) => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      filters.forEach((b) => b.classList.remove('active'));
      btn.classList.add('active');
      const f = btn.dataset.filter;
      items.forEach((item) => {
        if (f === 'all' || item.dataset.category === f) {
          item.style.display = '';
          requestAnimationFrame(() => { item.style.opacity = '1'; item.style.transform = 'scale(1)'; });
        } else {
          item.style.opacity = '0';
          item.style.transform = 'scale(0.95)';
          setTimeout(() => { item.style.display = 'none'; }, 300);
        }
      });
    });
  });

  /* ─── Scroll-triggered blueprint draw for sections ─── */
  const blueprintObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach((entry) => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        const lines = entry.target.querySelectorAll('.draw-line');
        lines.forEach((line) => {
          const len = line.getTotalLength ? line.getTotalLength() : 2000;
          line.style.strokeDasharray = len;
          line.style.strokeDashoffset = len;
          line.style.animation = 'none';
          void line.offsetWidth; // reflow
          line.style.animation = `drawIn 2s ease forwards`;
        });
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.2 });

  document.querySelectorAll('.split-project-image, .process-step, .gallery-item').forEach((el) => {
    blueprintObserver.observe(el);
  });

  /* ─── Smooth scroll for anchor links ─── */
  document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach((anchor) => {
    anchor.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      const target = document.querySelector(anchor.getAttribute('href'));
      if (target) {
        target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
      }
    });
  });
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Architect — Portfolio</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,700;1,400&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --black: #0a0a0a;
  --white: #f5f4f1;
  --warm-gray-100: #e8e6e3;
  --warm-gray-200: #d1cdc8;
  --warm-gray-300: #b5b0a8;
  --warm-gray-400: #8a8580;
  --warm-gray-500: #6b6560;
  --warm-gray-600: #4a4540;
  --warm-gray-700: #2d2a27;
  --blueprint: rgba(160,175,190,0.12);
  --blueprint-line: rgba(160,175,190,0.25);
  --blueprint-accent: #7a9bb5;
  --accent: #c4a882;
  --accent-dark: #a08860;
  --font-sans: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
  --font-serif: 'Playfair Display', serif;
  --transition: 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94);
  --transition-slow: 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94);
}

*, *::before, *::after { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

html { scroll-behavior: smooth; font-size: 16px; }

body {
  font-family: var(--font-sans);
  background: var(--white);
  color: var(--warm-gray-700);
  line-height: 1.7;
  overflow-x: hidden;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}

/* ─── Utility ─── */
.container { max-width: 1320px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 clamp(1.5rem, 4vw, 4rem); }
.section-pad { padding: clamp(5rem, 10vw, 9rem) 0; }
.section-label {
  font-family: var(--font-sans);
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.25em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.section-label::before {
  content: '';
  width: 2rem;
  height: 1px;
  background: var(--accent);
}
.section-title {
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.2rem);
  font-weight: 400;
  color: var(--black);
  line-height: 1.2;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.reveal {
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(40px);
  transition: opacity 0.8s ease, transform 0.8s ease;
}
.reveal.visible {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0);
}

/* ─── Blueprint grid background ─── */
.blueprint-bg {
  background-image:
    linear-gradient(var(--blueprint-line) 1px, transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(90deg, var(--blueprint-line) 1px, transparent 1px);
  background-size: 60px 60px;
}

/* ─── Navigation ─── */
.nav {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  z-index: 1000;
  padding: 1.5rem 0;
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.nav.scrolled {
  background: rgba(245,244,241,0.95);
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  padding: 1rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--warm-gray-200);
}
.nav-inner {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
}
.nav-logo {
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-size: 1.3rem;
  color: var(--black);
  text-decoration: none;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
}
.nav-logo span { color: var(--accent); }
.nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2.5rem; list-style: none; }
.nav-links a {
  text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--warm-gray-600);
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  transition: var(--transition);
  position: relative;
}
.nav-links a::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: -4px;
  left: 0;
  width: 0;
  height: 1px;
  background: var(--accent);
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.nav-links a:hover { color: var(--black); }
.nav-links a:hover::after { width: 100%; }
.nav-toggle {
  display: none;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 5px;
  background: none;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: 4px;
}
.nav-toggle span {
  width: 24px;
  height: 1.5px;
  background: var(--black);
  transition: var(--transition);
}

/* ─── Hero ─── */
.hero {
  min-height: 100vh;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: var(--white);
}
.hero-blueprint {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  opacity: 0.5;
}
.hero-blueprint svg {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
}
.hero-content {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 4rem;
  align-items: center;
  width: 100%;
}
.hero-text { max-width: 600px; }
.hero-overline {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.3em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 1rem;
}
.hero-overline::before {
  content: '';
  width: 3rem;
  height: 1px;
  background: var(--accent);
}
.hero-heading {
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 6vw, 5rem);
  font-weight: 400;
  color: var(--black);
  line-height: 1.1;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.hero-heading em {
  font-style: italic;
  color: var(--accent-dark);
}
.hero-desc {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-500);
  max-width: 440px;
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
  line-height: 1.8;
}
.hero-cta {
  display: flex;
  gap: 1.5rem;
  align-items: center;
}
.btn {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  padding: 0.9rem 2rem;
  font-family: var(--font-sans);
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  text-decoration: none;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.btn-primary {
  background: var(--black);
  color: var(--white);
}
.btn-primary:hover { background: var(--warm-gray-700); }
.btn-outline {
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--warm-gray-600);
  border: 1px solid var(--warm-gray-300);
}
.btn-outline:hover {
  border-color: var(--black);
  color: var(--black);
}
.btn svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; }
.hero-visual {
  position: relative;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
}
.hero-svg-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 520px;
}
.hero-svg-wrap svg { width: 100%; height: auto; }
.draw-line {
  stroke-dasharray: 2000;
  stroke-dashoffset: 2000;
  animation: drawIn 3s ease forwards;
}
.draw-line-delay1 { animation-delay: 0.3s; }
.draw-line-delay2 { animation-delay: 0.6s; }
.draw-line-delay3 { animation-delay: 0.9s; }
.draw-line-delay4 { animation-delay: 1.2s; }
@keyframes drawIn {
  to { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
}

/* ─── Split Projects ─── */
.split-projects { background: var(--warm-gray-100); }
.split-project {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  min-height: 80vh;
  position: relative;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--warm-gray-200);
}
.split-project:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.split-project-image {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: var(--warm-gray-200);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}
.split-project-image .placeholder-img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  transition: transform 0.8s ease;
}
.split-project:hover .placeholder-img { transform: scale(1.03); }
.split-project-image .img-overlay {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(10,10,10,0.1), transparent);
}
.split-project-image .corner-mark {
  position: absolute;
  width: 40px;
  height: 40px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(196,168,130,0.4);
}
.corner-mark.tl { top: 1.5rem; left: 1.5rem; border-right: none; border-bottom: none; }
.corner-mark.tr { top: 1.5rem; right: 1.5rem; border-left: none; border-bottom: none; }
.corner-mark.bl { bottom: 1.5rem; left: 1.5rem; border-right: none; border-top: none; }
.corner-mark.br { bottom: 1.5rem; right: 1.5rem; border-left: none; border-top: none; }
.split-project-info {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 5rem);
}
.split-project-number {
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-size: 5rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-200);
  line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.split-project-title {
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 3vw, 2.5rem);
  font-weight: 400;
  color: var(--black);
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.split-project-meta {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  display: flex;
  gap: 2rem;
}
.split-project-desc {
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-500);
  line-height: 1.8;
  max-width: 420px;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}
.split-project-link {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--black);
  text-decoration: none;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.split-project-link:hover { gap: 1.25rem; color: var(--accent-dark); }
.split-project-link svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; transition: var(--transition); }
.split-project:nth-child(even) .split-project-image { order: 2; }
.split-project:nth-child(even) .split-project-info { order: 1; }

/* ─── Process / Methodology ─── */
.process { background: var(--white); }
.process-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 0;
  margin-top: 4rem;
  position: relative;
}
.process-step {
  padding: 2.5rem 2rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--warm-gray-200);
  border-right: none;
  position: relative;
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.process-step:last-child { border-right: 1px solid var(--warm-gray-200); }
.process-step:hover { background: var(--warm-gray-100); }
.process-step-number {
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-size: 3rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-200);
  line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.process-step-icon {
  width: 48px;
  height: 48px;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.process-step-icon svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; }
.process-step-title {
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-size: 1.25rem;
  color: var(--black);
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.process-step-desc {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-500);
  line-height: 1.7;
}
.process-connector {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  right: -12px;
  width: 24px;
  height: 24px;
  z-index: 2;
}

/* ─── Awards ─── */
.awards { background: var(--black); color: var(--white); }
.awards .section-label { color: var(--accent); }
.awards .section-label::before { background: var(--accent); }
.awards .section-title { color: var(--white); }
.awards-list {
  margin-top: 3rem;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.award-item {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr 1fr 60px;
  gap: 2rem;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 1.75rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.award-item:first-child { border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); }
.award-item:hover { padding-left: 1rem; }
.award-year {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
}
.award-name {
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 400;
}
.award-org {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-400);
}
.award-arrow {
  width: 20px;
  height: 20px;
  opacity: 0;
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.award-item:hover .award-arrow { opacity: 1; }

/* ─── Gallery ─── */
.gallery { background: var(--warm-gray-100); }
.gallery-filters {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.gallery-filter {
  padding: 0.6rem 1.5rem;
  background: transparent;
  border: 1px solid var(--warm-gray-300);
  font-family: var(--font-sans);
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--warm-gray-500);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.gallery-filter:hover,
.gallery-filter.active {
  background: var(--black);
  color: var(--white);
  border-color: var(--black);
}
.gallery-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 1.5rem;
}
.gallery-item {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  aspect-ratio: 4/3;
  background: var(--warm-gray-200);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.gallery-item:nth-child(1) { grid-column: span 2; aspect-ratio: 16/9; }
.gallery-item:nth-child(5) { grid-column: span 2; aspect-ratio: 16/9; }
.gallery-item-img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  transition: transform 0.8s ease;
}
.gallery-item:hover .gallery-item-img { transform: scale(1.05); }
.gallery-item-overlay {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(10,10,10,0.7), transparent 60%);
  opacity: 0;
  transition: var(--transition);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  padding: 1.5rem;
}
.gallery-item:hover .gallery-item-overlay { opacity: 1; }
.gallery-item-overlay h3 {
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  color: var(--white);
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
}
.gallery-item-overlay p {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
}

/* ─── Clients Marquee ─── */
.clients {
  padding: 4rem 0;
  background: var(--white);
  overflow: hidden;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--warm-gray-200);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--warm-gray-200);
}
.clients-label {
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.25em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--warm-gray-400);
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
}
.marquee-track {
  display: flex;
  animation: marquee 30s linear infinite;
  width: max-content;
}
.marquee-track:hover { animation-play-state: paused; }
.client-logo {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  padding: 0 3rem;
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-size: 1.3rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-300);
  white-space: nowrap;
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.client-logo:hover { color: var(--black); }
@keyframes marquee {
  0% { transform: translateX(0); }
  100% { transform: translateX(-50%); }
}

/* ─── Testimonials ─── */
.testimonials { background: var(--white); }
.testimonial-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 2rem;
  margin-top: 3rem;
}
.testimonial-card {
  padding: 2.5rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--warm-gray-200);
  transition: var(--transition);
  position: relative;
}
.testimonial-card:hover {
  border-color: var(--accent);
  transform: translateY(-4px);
}
.testimonial-quote-mark {
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-size: 4rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-200);
  line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}
.testimonial-text {
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-600);
  line-height: 1.8;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
  font-style: italic;
}
.testimonial-author {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 1rem;
}
.testimonial-avatar {
  width: 44px;
  height: 44px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--warm-gray-200);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-500);
}
.testimonial-name {
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--black);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}
.testimonial-role {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-400);
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}

/* ─── Contact ─── */
.contact { background: var(--warm-gray-100); }
.contact-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 4rem;
  margin-top: 3rem;
}
.contact-info { padding-right: 2rem; }
.contact-info p {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-500);
  line-height: 1.8;
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
}
.contact-detail {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 1.5rem;
}
.contact-detail-item {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.25rem;
}
.contact-detail-label {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
}
.contact-detail-value {
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: var(--black);
}
.contact-form { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; }
.form-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1.5rem; }
.form-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.form-group label {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--warm-gray-500);
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}
.form-group input,
.form-group textarea,
.form-group select {
  padding: 0.9rem 1rem;
  background: var(--white);
  border: 1px solid var(--warm-gray-200);
  font-family: var(--font-sans);
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  color: var(--black);
  transition: var(--transition);
  outline: none;
}
.form-group input:focus,
.form-group textarea:focus,
.form-group select:focus {
  border-color: var(--black);
}
.form-group textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 140px; }
.form-submit {
  align-self: flex-start;
  padding: 1rem 2.5rem;
  background: var(--black);
  color: var(--white);
  border: none;
  font-family: var(--font-sans);
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.form-submit:hover { background: var(--warm-gray-700); }

/* ─── Footer ─── */
.footer {
  background: var(--black);
  color: var(--white);
  padding: 4rem 0 2rem;
}
.footer-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 3rem;
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
}
.footer-brand {
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-size: 1.3rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.footer-brand span { color: var(--accent); }
.footer-desc {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-400);
  line-height: 1.7;
  max-width: 300px;
}
.footer-col-title {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.2em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.footer-links { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.75rem; }
.footer-links a {
  text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--warm-gray-400);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.footer-links a:hover { color: var(--white); }
.footer-bottom {
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  padding-top: 2rem;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: var(--warm-gray-500);
}
.footer-socials { display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; }
.footer-socials a {
  color: var(--warm-gray-400);
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: var(--transition);
}
.footer-socials a:hover { color: var(--accent); }

/* ─── Geometric decorations ─── */
.geo-diamond {
  position: absolute;
  width: 80px;
  height: 80px;
  border: 1px solid var(--blueprint-line);
  transform: rotate(45deg);
  pointer-events: none;
}

/* ─── Responsive ─── */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
  .hero-content { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2rem; }
  .hero-visual { display: none; }
  .split-project { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .split-project-image { min-height: 50vh; order: 0 !important; }
  .split-project-info { order: 1 !important; }
  .process-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
  .process-step:nth-child(2) { border-right: 1px solid var(--warm-gray-200); }
  .process-step { border-right: 1px solid var(--warm-gray-200); }
  .process-step:nth-child(odd) { border-right: none; }
  .award-item { grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr; }
  .award-org, .award-arrow { display: none; }
  .gallery-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
  .gallery-item:nth-child(1),
  .gallery-item:nth-child(5) { grid-column: span 1; aspect-ratio: 4/3; }
  .contact-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .nav-links { display: none; }
  .nav-links.open {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    position: absolute;
    top: 100%;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    background: rgba(245,244,241,0.98);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    padding: 2rem;
    gap: 1.5rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--warm-gray-200);
  }
  .nav-toggle { display: flex; }
  .testimonial-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .process-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .process-step { border-right: 1px solid var(--warm-gray-200) !important; }
  .gallery-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .gallery-item:nth-child(1),
  .gallery-item:nth-child(5) { grid-column: span 1; }
  .form-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2rem; }
  .footer-bottom { flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; text-align: center; }
  .award-item { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 0.5rem; }
}
</style>
</head>

<script>
(function () {
  /* ─── Scroll reveal ─── */
  const reveals = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach((entry) => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        entry.target.classList.add('visible');
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.12, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });
  reveals.forEach((el) => observer.observe(el));

  /* ─── Nav scroll effect ─── */
  const nav = document.getElementById('nav');
  let lastScroll = 0;
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    const y = window.scrollY;
    if (y > 80) {
      nav.classList.add('scrolled');
    } else {
      nav.classList.remove('scrolled');
    }
    lastScroll = y;
  }, { passive: true });

  /* ─── Mobile nav toggle ─── */
  const toggle = document.getElementById('navToggle');
  const links = document.getElementById('navLinks');
  toggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
    links.classList.toggle('open');
    const spans = toggle.querySelectorAll('span');
    if (links.classList.contains('open')) {
      spans[0].style.transform = 'rotate(45deg) translate(4px, 4px)';
      spans[1].style.opacity = '0';
      spans[2].style.transform = 'rotate(-45deg) translate(4px, -4px)';
    } else {
      spans[0].style.transform = '';
      spans[1].style.opacity = '';
      spans[2].style.transform = '';
    }
  });

  /* Close nav on link click (mobile) */
  links.querySelectorAll('a').forEach((a) => {
    a.addEventListener('click', () => {
      links.classList.remove('open');
      const spans = toggle.querySelectorAll('span');
      spans[0].style.transform = '';
      spans[1].style.opacity = '';
      spans[2].style.transform = '';
    });
  });

  /* ─── Gallery filter ─── */
  const filters = document.querySelectorAll('.gallery-filter');
  const items = document.querySelectorAll('.gallery-item');
  filters.forEach((btn) => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      filters.forEach((b) => b.classList.remove('active'));
      btn.classList.add('active');
      const f = btn.dataset.filter;
      items.forEach((item) => {
        if (f === 'all' || item.dataset.category === f) {
          item.style.display = '';
          requestAnimationFrame(() => { item.style.opacity = '1'; item.style.transform = 'scale(1)'; });
        } else {
          item.style.opacity = '0';
          item.style.transform = 'scale(0.95)';
          setTimeout(() => { item.style.display = 'none'; }, 300);
        }
      });
    });
  });

  /* ─── Scroll-triggered blueprint draw for sections ─── */
  const blueprintObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach((entry) => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        const lines = entry.target.querySelectorAll('.draw-line');
        lines.forEach((line) => {
          const len = line.getTotalLength ? line.getTotalLength() : 2000;
          line.style.strokeDasharray = len;
          line.style.strokeDashoffset = len;
          line.style.animation = 'none';
          void line.offsetWidth; // reflow
          line.style.animation = `drawIn 2s ease forwards`;
        });
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.2 });

  document.querySelectorAll('.split-project-image, .process-step, .gallery-item').forEach((el) => {
    blueprintObserver.observe(el);
  });

  /* ─── Smooth scroll for anchor links ─── */
  document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach((anchor) => {
    anchor.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      const target = document.querySelector(anchor.getAttribute('href'));
      if (target) {
        target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
      }
    });
  });
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
